title: Building Regulations 2000, Schedule 1, Part L Approved Documents proposed revisions for multi-foil insulation
body: "The department considers that it is necessary to issue this letter along with circular 06/2007 because of 2 recent letters about the case sent to building control bodies by Actis, the company which brought the case to which the 2 November judgment mentioned above relates, and Ashurst, Actis’s lawyers. "
